meaning: adj.父亲的,如父亲的,慈爱的,爱护的
examples: He keeps a fatherly eye on his players.
There was no fatherly affection, no display of sentiment.
Fatherly love is as deep and wide as the sea.
"You have to think of a large stone birthday cake, " Haas says with an almost fatherly pride.
As she got in the car, he gave her a fatherly kiss on the cheek.
